$schema_note: Workspace-wide configuration. Fork this repository and edit this file (and repos.json / purposes/) for your own organization.
allowed_push_orgs_note: GitHub orgs/users that git push is allowed to target, enforced by .githooks/pre-push in every cloned repo and worktree. Empty list = no restriction (a warning is printed on push).
ticket_source_note: Adapter used by /open-task to fetch ticket content into docs/task.md. One of the scripts in scripts/lib/ticket-sources/ (without .sh): 'manual' | 'github-issues'. Additional adapters can be dropped into that directory (see examples/ticket-sources/).
ticket_id_pattern_note: Ticket IDs must match this pattern. The prefix is required and never auto-added.
